intro.title: EDA Mindset
intro.bodyMarkdown:
EDA Mindset is a core topic when learning R for data analysis, statistics, and reproducible research.

Practicing this topic builds fluency with R syntax, data structures, and the tidyverse ecosystem.

Run the sample code below, experiment in the editor, then work through the challenges.
intro.sandboxCode: print("Ask questions, visualize, iterate before modeling")

mtcars %>% group_by(cyl) %>% summarize(m = mean(mpg), sd = sd(mpg))
